title: Advanced Biofuels Canada Congratulates Prime Minister Mark Carney and the Liberal Party of Canada on Election Victory
content:
Advanced Biofuels Canada Association (ABFC) today congratulated Prime Minister Mark Carney and the Liberal Party of Canada on the outcome of the 45th general election. The association released the following statement by President Fred Ghatala:

â€œThe ongoing trade war has created a unique need for Canada to refocus and strengthen domestic energy security. Renewable fuel producers across the country are ready to be part of the solution. Advanced Biofuels Canada Association looks forward to working with the Carney government to expand demand for clean fuels â€” the most cost-effective way to reduce emissions.â€
author: Analysts Account
